markers.name: C_quantum_consciousness
markers.protocol: Compare on-chip EEG-gamma band-power at 56 Hz to phi^-1 threshold

markers.name: tau_microtubule
markers.protocol: Hardware latch sampling at 25 ms phase windows cross-correlated with PFC C_GATE
markers.fallback: Demote tau_microtubule to NUL, route T_PRESENT directly from 56 Hz divider

markers.name: k_dark_coupling
markers.protocol: Snap to Planck 2024 + DESI 2025 cosmological-constant value at boot from external EEPROM
markers.fallback: Use IPCC fallback constant, recompute G via 4-constant identity

markers.name: zeta_neural_zeta
markers.expected: non-trivial-zero density on first 512 cortical eigenvalues
markers.protocol: 512-entry FIFO of cortical eigenvalue spectra, on-chip zeta residue accumulator
markers.fallback: Disable ZETA_NEURAL_SPECTRUM_FIFO at boot; G_MERKLE keeps standard pi^3 gamma^2 / phi form
